_instructions: Fill in all null values from the PANW Q2 FY26 press release PDF. Save as panw_q2fy26_press_release_supplement.json (remove this _instructions field). All dollar figures in millions unless noted. Percentages as decimals e.g. 76.6, not 0.766.
_source: PANW Q2 FY26 press release, fiscal date ending 2026-01-31, reported 2026-02-17

nongaap_metrics._note: EBITDA: if not stated, derive as non-GAAP OI + D&A from nongaap bridge table. Note the derivation.

balance_sheet_highlights._note: Deferred revenue is usually in the balance sheet section of the press release.

operational_kpis._note: Platformized customers and NGS ARR are typically in the earnings call prepared remarks, not the press release. Cross-reference the transcript.

stock_reaction._note: Use Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg for price data around the Feb 17 date.

beat_miss_vs_consensus._note: Consensus figures come from gather.py FMP pull. Fill actuals from press release.
